feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2083 201 1882 98
TR 1928 172 1756 82

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Speech to Text : Voice to Text
entry.id: Speech to Text : Voice to Text-tr-1782185577372
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Year：₺499,99
  • 6 Months：₺229,99
  • Month：₺99,99

Application Description

Speech to text : Voice to text is the powerful, real-time dictation solution. Based on the latest artificial intelligence and using a powerful speech recognition engine, This Dictation app accurately transcribes your speech to text in real time. The clean elegant design, along with the non-stop voice recognition and other features means you can relax and focus on your thoughts and content. Using our app , your words will be magically transcribed into text without your ever needing to touch a keyboard. Now you can use the power of your voice to create your words! Easily share your text and files later! (Works with Evernote, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, Facebook, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp and other iOS supported sharing apps.) Whether you’re a professional writer, doctor, lawyer, disabled or somehow prevented from traditional typing, Speech to text : Voice to text app will swiftly solve your transcription problems and help you achieve your writing goals today! This fantastic speech-to-text app will allow you to do more with your iPhone/ iPad : ・Longer Record time: -DICTATE CONTINUOUSLY up-to 1 HOUR. ・Unlimited save & edits ・Transcribed text can be edited directly. ・Ideal for both individual and group transcription ・Background support for voice recognition. ・On-device Speech Recognition. • Voice recognition support for 59 languages and accents. • Share your text on social networks. • Copy your text to other apps. • Send your text as an email or text message. • Create PDF instantly with single click. • Convert text your notes, reports, letters into PDF instantly • Text Analysis using AI. ► Currently Supported Speech Recognition Languages: Arabic, Cantonese, Catalan, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Norwegian, Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Shanghainese, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese. Technology: New iOS 14 Speech framework having state of the art accuracy, Faster ,Automatically adapts to the user Super easy: Simply click the microphone and start dictating. No need to login or register You can add new paragraphs, punctuation marks, smileys and other special characters using simple voice commands. Who Should Use Speech to Text : Voice to Text ? 1. Reporters: Interviews, conversations and more are easily recorded and transcribed, preserving the original audio. 2. Writers: Novelists, Authors, can all write in their true voice, capturing their moments of inspiration anytime, anywhere. 3. Professionals: Doctors, lawyers, managers, etc. Easily transcribe your daily tasks, notes, conference calls, letters and more! Your voice makes it happen! 4. Elderly or Disabled: Eliminates slow typing, commonly misspelled words or embarrassing composition mistakes. This app makes it convenient and easy to send and share your words with those you love. 5. Language Students: Text analysis using AI , Easily learn and master new words and languages by practicing dictation with speech to text app ! SUBSCRIPTION PRICING & TERMS We offer three auto-renewing subscription options: $1.99 / month $9.49 / 6 months - Save 20% $14.49 / 1 year - Save 40% The price corresponds to the same price segment , which are set in the “Apple App Store Matrix” for other currencies You can cancel a subscription anytime by turning off auto renewal though your iTunes account settings.This must be done 24 hours before the end of subscription period to avoid being charged. The cancellation will take effect the day after the last day of the current subscription. Terms of Service : https://voiceovermaker.com/termsofuse Privacy Policy: https://voiceovermaker.com/privacypolicy Support: Please email for any suggestions/feedback voiceovermakerz@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Dash for Tesla
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺229,99 [₺149,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺229,99

Application Description

Dash for Tesla is a Bluetooth‑based digital dashboard designed for Tesla owners. No login, no cloud authorization, and no additional hardware box are required. With just your phone and Bluetooth, you can access vehicle speed and other officially supported data and display them in multiple dashboard styles. Core Highlights No login · No cloud auth · No extra box You don’t need to enter your Tesla account, request remote API tokens, or install any OBD/communication box. As long as your vehicle supports Bluetooth key capabilities, you can connect locally and display data. Local Bluetooth connection Uses the vehicle’s officially supported Bluetooth capabilities to connect locally and show basic information such as speed and selected vehicle status on your phone. Dashboard‑first experience The core of the app is a digital cluster: it focuses on key driving information like speed, so you can read what matters at a glance. Multiple themes and backgrounds Choose from different dashboard backgrounds and color themes to match your personal style and interior mood. Local‑first, fast response Communication is local over BLE, not dependent on cloud connectivity, which means faster response and better stability even in poor or no network conditions. Privacy & Security No account registration is required, and we do not build a cloud profile based on your personal identity. Vehicle data is primarily processed locally on your device rather than stored long‑term on our own servers. Permissions such as Bluetooth and Location are used only to enable local communication with the vehicle and to support dashboard features. Ideal for drivers who Want a simple, focused digital speedometer and status dashboard. Prefer not to share Tesla account credentials or rely on cloud‑based remote control. Don’t want to install extra hardware boxes and just use the phone plus the vehicle itself. Important Notice Dash for Tesla is an independent third‑party tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to Tesla, Inc. or any of its subsidiaries. The app only displays data based on the vehicle’s officially supported Bluetooth capabilities and does not perform any modification or flashing of the vehicle. All Tesla‑related trademarks and brand names are the property of their respective owners and are used only for descriptive purposes.

entry.title: Leek Inc. 2
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Leek VIP：₺399,99 → ₺249,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺399,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

In-App Purchases

  • Leek Goldcoin +10000：₺499,99
  • Leek VIP：₺249,99
  • Leek Goldcoin +100：₺49,99
  • Treasure Chest Master：₺149,99
  • Leek Goldcoin +10：₺49,99
  • Leek Goldcoin +1000：₺199,99

Application Description

Leek Investment Company 2 is finally here, a new capital frenzy waiting for you to open! 1.New beautiful pixel graphics, up to 100 kinds of buildings, more than 200 kinds of icons; 2.Create value for the company, get promotion opportunities and a lot of commissions; acquire shares of the company and become the president of the company; 3.Real trading system (100x leveraged trading), up to thousands of random events, to make huge profits in the ever-changing market; 4.Awesome BTC mining system, simulating the BTC arithmetic system, hoarding a large number of mining machines to become a super miner; 5.Recruit talent to work for you and get double the results depending on the employee's occupation and talent; 6.Enter the leek club, get acquainted with industry elites and the world's richest people, and build your own business empire; 7.ICO/IPO system; 8.Extra large city map, city buildings can be acquired or upgraded; 9.Built-in multiple arithmetic games or DAPP; 10.Private garage, luxury car collection...

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: EvoCreo2 Catch & Tame Monsters
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Prime gemma 100：₺49,99
  • Tamer Kit：₺29,99
  • Master Package：₺999,99
  • Starter Package：₺149,99
  • Prime Gemma 500：₺249,99
  • Spray kit：₺199,99
  • Ascensio Kit：₺249,99
  • Zenith Islands DLC Sale：₺149,99
  • Prime Dimension DLC Sale：₺149,99
  • Crystal Offer Sale：₺499,99

Application Description

Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer? Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures. Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles. Explore this monster adventure game Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer? Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer? Key Features: - Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide - 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve. - No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame! - A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay. - Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements. - Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo. - Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards. - Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game. - Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs. Why Players Love EvoCreo 2: Fans of Monster games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home. A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy. Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure. Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：₺49,99 → ₺39,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺99,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：₺39,99
  • Premium Lifetime：₺399,99
  • Pro – Lifetime：₺0,00
  • Yearly Subscription：₺299,99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration. Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1 Terms of Use (EULA): Apple App Store https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: This War of Mine
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺799,99 → ₺99,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺799,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • The Little Ones：₺99,99

Application Description

"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK "This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps "I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better. This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? Key Features: • Inspired by real-life events • Control your survivors and manage your shelter • Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive • Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience • Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game • Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands. • Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine • Protect innocent children • Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need • Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Mini Landlord - Watch Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Full Game Unlock：₺49,99
  • Luxury Pack：₺79,99
  • Medium Pack：₺49,99

Application Description

From the creators of "Mini Billiards," comes a classic Doudizhu (Landlord Poker) game exclusively designed for Apple Watch! Experience smart AI opponents, 3 difficulty levels, and immersive haptic feedback. No internet needed. No iPhone needed. Just lift your wrist and play anytime, anywhere! Game Features: • Premium Offline Experience: One-time purchase, no ads, no data usage. Play on the subway, on a plane, or anywhere without signal. • 3 Difficulty Levels: Easy Mode: Newbie friendly with great starting hands. Pure stress relief. Medium Mode: Classic strategy. Win with your skills. Hard Mode: High Rollers! High stakes, high rewards. Heart-pounding action! • Emergency Aid System: Ran out of beans? Don't worry! The system provides free "Emergency Aid" beans to help you make a comeback. The fun never stops! • Customizable Skins: Use your winnings to unlock premium table themes. • Immersive Haptics: Large button layout optimized for the watch face, combined with Taptic Engine feedback for a satisfying gaming feel. • Watch Face Complication: Add to your watch face for one-tap instant access. No waiting. ‌How to Play:‌ • Tap Cards: Tap to select cards (cards will float up); tap again to deselect. • Play Cards: Tap the play button. The smart system auto-detects card patterns and prevents invalid moves. • Bid for Landlord: Choose to bid 1-3 points based on your hand strength. • Long Press to Quit: Perfect for a quick break! Long press the screen for 1 second to instantly exit the game and return to the watch face. • Winning: The Landlord wins by playing all cards first. Farmers win if either teammate plays all cards first.

entry.title: Flying Carpet File Transfer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Direct file transfer between iOS, Android, Linux, and Windows with no wireless network or internet connection required: just two devices in close range using ad hoc WiFi (and optionally Bluetooth). Other versions available for free at https://flyingcarpet.spiegl.dev.

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Blasphemous
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺209,99 [₺209,99 ~ ₺399,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺209,99

Application Description

Fight. Endure. Break eternal damnation. Blasphemous is an award-winning 2D indie action platformer with soulslike elements, offering brutal hack and slash combat and deep exploration across a dark, gothic world steeped in penance and suffering. Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, ravaged by a twisted curse known only as The Miracle, you play as The Penitent One, the last survivor of the Brotherhood of the Silent Sorrow, bound to a cycle of death and rebirth. Face monstrous enemies, navigate deadly traps, and uncover hidden secrets in pixel perfect handcrafted levels. As you fight for redemption, you'll explore desolate cathedrals, forsaken wastelands, and blood-soaked dungeons, encountering grotesque monsters, merciless bosses and tormented souls along the way. Penance Never Ends. MAIN FEATURES - Explore a Non-Linear World: Venture through diverse platformer environments filled with fearsome enemies and deadly traps. Seek redemption across the dark gothic landscapes of Cvstodia. - Brutal Action Combat: Wield Mea Culpa, a blade forged from guilt itself. Unleash devastating combos and skills, and hack and slash your way through hordes of twisted monsters. - Executions & gore: Deliver savage executions with pixel perfect animations that celebrate brutal combat and grotesque detail. - Customise Your Build: Equip powerful Relics, Rosary Beads, Prayers, and Sword Hearts to shape your playstyle. Experiment with builds and unlock new progression paths to survive the impossible. - Intense boss Battles: Face off against colossal bosses and deadly mini-bosses. Learn their patterns, endure their fury, and crush them. - Unlock the Mysteries of Cvstodia: Meet a cast of tortured NPCs. Some will help, others will test your resolve. Unravel their stories and shape your fate in blood, guilt and damnation. ALL DLCs INCLUDED This mobile version includes all free DLCs ever released for Blasphemous, expanding the core game with new content, features, and challenges: - The Stir of Dawn – Unlock New Game+, encounter new bosses and enemies, and dive deeper into the lore. - Strife & Ruin – Brave the brutal Boss Rush mode and embark on a crossover quest with Miriam from Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night. - Wounds of Eventide – Witness the conclusion of The Penitent One’s first journey and unlock an ending that connects directly to Blasphemous 2. THE FULL BLASPHEMOUS EXPERIENCE – NOW ON MOBILE - Includes every feature and content update from the original PC and console versions. Switch between precise touch controls or full controller support (gamepad compatible) for a seamless experience. - No ads, no microtransactions. MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Some Nudity or Sexual Content, Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.

entry.title: The Last Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺49,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Traverse the dungeon in this awesome action / bullet-hell roguelite where every choice could make or break your run. Stack over 130 different items and create powerful synergies to become truly overpowered with 13 unique characters! BALANCE RISK & REWARD Balance risk and reward as your make your choices! Push your luck to grow your build, but don't overestimate your abilities, or your run could end on the spot. Navigate the dungeon wisely and reap the rewards to optimize your build to crush the dungeon with 13 unique characters! BECOME OVERPOWERED Over 130 unique items can be mixed and matched to create a devastating build, laying waste to every enemy in sight! Be careful not to hurt yourself with an item that doesn't fit, and experiment with synergies to become an overpowered behemoth! FIND SECRETS Uncover the secrets of the dungeon on your quest to slay the Villain to unlock hidden paths, uncover new items, and grow your band of adventurers! And for those who crave a challenge, the greatest rewards are locked behind the greatest trials! PLAY WITH FRIENDS Play solo or with others in local co-op, with up to 4 people! Combine character abilities to improve your odds, or do a mild amount of trolling, the choice is yours! Please note that extra controllers are required to play with others.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Invading Horde - TD
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺19,99 [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

In-App Purchases

  • Starter pack：₺249,99
  • Stars pack 3：₺149,99
  • Stars Pack 2：₺99,99
  • Stars Pack 1：₺49,99
  • Gems pack 3：₺149,99
  • Gems pack 2：₺99,99
  • Gems pack 1：₺49,99

Application Description

An Invading Horde has been spotted to the west of the Kingdom. The King has selected a lucky random subject to defend the Realm. You take on the role of the unfortunate farmer tasked with this great undertaking. Build defensive Towers to defeat the Invading Horde.  Complete levels to earn Stars to upgrade your Weapons, Obstacles and Magic. Earn Gems to unlock more Towers, Obstacles and Magic. Features ● Fast paced Tower Defense action ● Quirky story line ● Pause the action to plan your strategy ● Cast Magic spells to smite the Horde ● Drop Obstacles in the road to slow down the Horde ● Unlock powerful new Towers, Obstacles, Items and Magic

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: MiniGames - Retro Watch Games
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺19,99 [₺19,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

Application Description

MiniGames is a collection of new, retro and modern games. You can play on your Apple Watch, iPhone or iPad with no Ads! It's like your own personal games arcade on the go. This collection of 28 games includes: ■ GLIDE Help the red bird fly. Use the hills to gain speed and soar high to score points. ■ CIPHER Crack the code. Guess the 4 color code from the clues you get per turn. ■ SHAPES Fun puzzle game where you drop shapes to merge them into new shapes. ■ TIC TAC TOE Classic game of noughts and crosses. Play single player or against a friend. ■ PONG Play one of the first video games ever created. This simple tennis like game is an absolute classic. ■ BRICK BREAK A fun retro falling brick game. Stack the bricks together to clear a line and score some points. ■ INVADERS Classic arcade action. Shoot all the space invaders before they get you. Hit the mothership for bonus points. ■ 2048 Enjoy the addictive 2048 game on your watch or phone. Swipe the number tiles around to join them. Join the tiles to reach 2048. ■ TUBE TWIST Guide your runner down an endless tube. Twist the tube to avoid the holes and spikes. Collect the yellow power orbs, the more you collect the longer you can speed boost. Tap your player to activate your speed boost. Hit the red jumps while boosting to get your bonus score. ■ BUBBLE Classic match 3 puzzle game. Connect the bubbles by color to clear them. ■ MISSILE How long can you survive a deadly onslaught of homing missiles? Maneuver your fighter plane to avoid the missiles and make them crash into each other. ■ HOP Jump from platform to platform to gain more height and points. Shoot the winged baddies along the way. ■ Drift Enjoy high octane drifting down a treacherous road. One false move and down you go. Try and survive as long as you can to get the top score. ■ Cong It's like pong, but in a circle. Use the digital crown to move the paddle around the circle and keep the ball in play. ■ Tower Build your Tower by stacking colourful blocks on top of each other. Place them perfectly for bonus points. ■ FLAP Guide the bird through a never ending forest by flapping your wings. ■ FROG ROAD Help the cute frogs avoid the cars and cross the road. A 3D update to the classic Frogger game. ■ BLOCK RUN Feel like going for a a run? Help the voxel guy avoid the colourful obstacles by jumping, rolling and turning around the corners. ■ MATCHTRIS A mashup of Tetris and Dr. Mario. Move the falling blocks to match 4 or more colors to clear them. Setup the blocks to fall and match for combos and extra points. ■ DRONE Pilot your drone down the never ending corridors of an Alien spaceship. ■ THRUST Strap your rocket boots on and zoom down a dark cave. Thrust combines a classic cave flyer game with elements of flappy bird. ■ SUPER JUMP We’ve taken the fun of the humble platformer game and mashed it with an endless runner. Keep your player running by jumping over holes, ditches and enemies. Collect fruit to score points and the more you score the faster you run. ■ RETRO RACER Inspired by pseudo 3d racing games like Outrun and Pole Position but with modern graphics. Enjoy the surreal, exhilarating sense of speed while you race to beat the clock. Please note this game requires a watch series 4 or newer. ■ CONTRA PANG A mashup of Contra’s shooting action and the bubble popping fun of Pang. ■ CIRCLE INVADERS A new twist to the classic Space Invaders. With a unique circular design and lots of power-ups. ■ MOON SNAKE We took the classic fruit eating snake and put him on the moon. Avoid the bombs and your own tail to survive. ■ DUAL BREAK What could be better than the classic paddle game Breakout? How about power-ups and an extra paddle to control. ■ CIRCLE BREAK It’s like Pong in a Circle meets Breakout. Keep the ball from leaving the circle and break all the obstacles to finish the stage. Features: • No ads! • Apple Watch support • Screen shake • Vibrations • Sound Effects • Music • Leaderboards

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Otoparkçı
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → ₺4,99 [₺4,99 ~ ₺19,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺4,99

Application Description

Otoparkçı’da küçük bir otoparkın başına geçiyorsun. İlk başta sadece birkaç park yerin var; ama doğru kararlarla kazancını artırıp otoparkını adım adım büyütebilirsin. Araçları uygun park alanlarına al, süreleri dolduğunda paranı topla ve müşteri memnuniyetini dengede tut. Hava durumu, gün içindeki yoğunluk ve verdiğin kararlar kazancını doğrudan etkiler. Bazen işler sakin gider, bazen de otopark bir anda dolup taşar. Yeni park yerleri aç, kapasiteni artır, gerektiğinde ek vardiya çağırarak işleri hızlandır. Her gün daha fazla kazanmak için fiyat, memnuniyet ve yoğunluk dengesini iyi kurman gerekir. Basit görünen ama doğru hamlelerle büyüyen bir otopark işletmeye hazır mısın?

entry.title: CD’ci: Oyun Al-Sat
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺19,99 → ₺9,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺29,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺9,99

Application Description

Küçük bir oyun dükkânıyla başlayın ve onu başarılı bir işletmeye dönüştürün. Gün boyunca dükkânınıza farklı müşteriler gelir. Bazıları eski oyunlarını satmak isterken, bazıları ise koleksiyonlarına ekleyecek özel parçalar arar. Amacınız akıllı anlaşmalar yapmak, doğru fiyata alım yapmak ve kâr ederek satmaktır. Her oyun farklıdır. Bazılarını bulmak kolaydır, bazıları ise çok daha nadir ve değerlidir. Kutunun ve diskin durumu da büyük önem taşır, bu yüzden her ürünü dikkatlice incelemek işin önemli bir parçasıdır. Bir anlaşma yapmadan önce detaylara bakmalı, müşterinin teklifini değerlendirmeli ve karşı teklif vermeye değip değmeyeceğine karar vermelisiniz. Bazen tek bir iyi pazarlık bile büyük fark yaratabilir. Daha fazla para kazandıkça dükkânınız büyümeye başlar. İşinizi geliştirebilir, daha iyi ticaretler yapabilir ve zamanla daha güçlü bir koleksiyon oluşturabilirsiniz. Oyun; ikinci el oyun ticaretini, basit pazarlık mekaniklerini, detaylı ürün durumlarını ve sıcak bir retro pixel art tarzını bir araya getirerek keyifli bir dükkân yönetimi deneyimi sunar. Dükkânınızı büyütün, daha iyi anlaşmalar yapın, harika oyunlar toplayın ve gerçek bir CD’ci olun.
